title: Transactions – acquiring and disposing of crypto assets
description: Activities that amount to crypto asset transactions and how to treat your crypto asset investments for tax purposes.
keywords: crypto transaction tax, transactions with crypto, tax on crypto asset transactions, acquiring crypto, disposing of crypto

child_links.title: Crypto asset transactions
child_links.description: Most activities involving crypto assets count as transactions and can trigger a CGT event.

child_links.title: Crypto to crypto exchange or swap
child_links.description: How CGT applies when exchanging or swapping one crypto asset for another.

child_links.title: Non-fungible tokens
child_links.description: How tax applies to transactions involving non-fungible tokens, another type of crypto asset.

child_links.title: Staking rewards and airdrops
child_links.description: How tax applies to crypto rewards and new tokens from staking crypto assets.

child_links.title: Crypto asset transactions with gift cards or debit cards
child_links.description: How tax applies to crypto asset transactions involving gift cards or debit cards.

child_links.title: Crypto asset prizes and gambling winnings
child_links.description: How tax applies to prizes and gambling winnings you receive in crypto assets.

child_links.title: Gifts and donations of crypto assets
child_links.description: How tax applies to transactions when you gift or donate crypto assets or receive them as a gift.

child_links.title: Loss or theft of crypto assets
child_links.description: Evidence you'll need to claim a capital loss if your crypto asset is lost or stolen.

child_links.title: Crypto exchanges and platforms under administration
child_links.description: What happens if a crypto exchange or platform goes into external administration.

child_links.title: Crypto assets payments relating to employment or services
child_links.description: How to treat employment-related crypto asset payments you receive from your employer or a third party.

child_links.title: Crypto asset transactions and tax residency
child_links.description: How tax residency and income source affects the tax you pay on crypto asset transactions.

source_title: Transactions – acquiring and disposing of crypto assets
